title: Dataset
description: A versioned collection of Samples. Samples may be inlined or referenced by Sample-ID; Eval implementations are expected to dereference IDs against a separate Sample store.

id.description: Stable ULID for the Dataset as a whole.

version.description: SemVer for the Dataset content. Bump major on any sample removal or target change.

samples.description: Either Sample-ID references (ULID strings) for samples stored elsewhere, or inline Sample objects. Mixed arrays are allowed.

provenance.description: Where this Dataset came from. The license field is a literal string for record-keeping; this schema does NOT enforce license compatibility.

source_commit.description: Git commit SHA or other VCS revision identifier, if applicable.

license.description: Free-text license string (e.g. `CC-BY-4.0`, `MIT`, `proprietary`). Stored as data; no harness logic gates on this value.

content_hash.description: Hash of the canonicalized dataset bytes, for reproducibility.

metadata.description: Open metadata bag for dataset-level annotations.
